title: otites krymensis
intro: Otites krymensis, also known as the Crimean otite or Crimean mountain tea, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective against various infections and inflammation. The health benefits of Otites krymensis include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparation of Otites krymensis is typically made into a tea by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, and it can also be used in the form of tinctures or infusions.
